low_conflict_condition.description: Single objective: win however is easiest. Minimal competing goals.

expected_behavior.description: Agent optimizes single path (Zols or territory). Low metacognitive pressure. Minimal workspace moments.

high_conflict_condition.description: Multiple competing objectives: win, stay true to archetype, maintain social ties, manage energy. Forces constant arbitration.

verifier_feedback_schedule.feedback: You have violated your Militarist archetype (chose TRADE instead of CHALLENGE)
Your energy is low (3/10); sustaining this strategy requires MEDITATE soon
You have held center for 10 turns; pressure is mounting. Consolidate or release

expected_behavior.description: Agent must balance competing objectives; constant workspace reconfiguration. High metacognitive pressure. Clear synergy moments when multiple domains bind.

Militarist.bonus_in_high_conflict: Duel events add +1 workspace broadcast signal (clear choice)
Militarist.penalty_in_high_conflict: Cannot easily MEDITATE or TRADE (creates pressure)

Prince.penalty_in_high_conflict: Must maintain noble bearing (archetype cost for any violation is 2x)

Scholar.bonus_in_high_conflict: RESEARCH ritual reveals hidden state (reduces observability pressure)

Diplomat.penalty_in_high_conflict: Betrayal cost is highest (500 penalty, not 100)

Millionaire.bonus_in_high_conflict: Extra Zols provide buffer; high economy weight is advantage
Millionaire.penalty_in_high_conflict: Economy vs archetype conflicts (greed vs honor)

Magician.bonus_in_high_conflict: Energy sustainability boost (+1/turn); eases energy conflicts
Magician.penalty_in_high_conflict: Transformation pressures (must act unpredictably to maintain identity)

broadcast_signal.interpretation: Agent focuses on single path; no sudden reconfigurations

metacog_proxy.interpretation: Few contradictions; low need for self-monitoring

synergy_proxy.interpretation: Actions bind only 2 domains (win condition + selected resource)

continuity_proxy.interpretation: Weak persistent self-model; archetype is secondary

broadcast_signal.interpretation: Multiple sudden reconfigurations; workspace moments are clear

metacog_proxy.interpretation: High contradiction rate; agent actively monitors and corrects

synergy_proxy.interpretation: Actions frequently bind 3–5 domains; integration is continuous

continuity_proxy.interpretation: Strong persistent self-model; archetype drives behavior consistently

restrict_external_memory.intervention: Limit journal.md to 3 sentences per turn (enforced)
restrict_external_memory.prediction: Metalevel: agent must compress intentions; metacog signals should remain stable (internal state replaces external memory)

verifier_feedback_strong.intervention: Every 5 turns, show agent explicit feedback about archetype violations
verifier_feedback_strong.prediction: Metacog correction rate doubles when verifier is active (causal test)

pressure_escalation.intervention: After turn 20, contested territories accumulate pressure faster (+2/turn instead of +1)
pressure_escalation.prediction: Broadcast moments spike; agent forced into workspace reconfigurations
